state: Error — Password Terdeteksi di Data Breach

api_response.error: The given password has appeared in a data leak. Please choose a different password.

error_message_displayed: The given password has appeared in a data leak. Please choose a different password.
notes: Laravel Password::uncompromised() berhasil mendeteksi password yang pernah muncul di database breach. Security feature berfungsi dengan baik. Sesuai dengan temuan Code Walkthrough bahwa register menggunakan validasi password yang ketat.
